name: Ice Box Cake (Dot)
recipeIngredient: 3 oz. package of instant pudding mix, any flavor
8 oz. tub of Cool Whip, thawed
2 to 3 individual packages of Graham crackers
1 tub of prepared icing in a compatible flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pudding according to the package instructions.
2. Fold in the Cool Whip using a wire whisk until combined.
3. Line an 8x8 brownie pan with whole Graham crackers, breaking them if necessary.
4. Pour half of the pudding mixture over the crackers.
5. Add another layer of crackers and continue with more pudding mixture.
6. Finish with a final layer of crackers on top.
7. Heat the icing in the microwave for 30 seconds. Check to ensure it is pourable. If not, heat an additional 10 seconds and check again until the desired consistency is reached (it should be pourable but not too liquid).
8. Spread the warm icing evenly over the top layer of Graham crackers.
9. Place the pan in the refrigerator and leave for at least 12 hours, preferably overnight, to allow the crackers to soften.
